Home.title: osobní-web
Home.description: A minimalist space built with Tailwind v4.
Home.heroDescription: This project has been purified to its core components. All unnecessary decorations have been removed to focus on content and typography. Using <primary>next-themes</primary> for a seamless dark-mode experience.

modular.title: Modular
modular.description: Built with reusable components and a strict design system.

adaptive.title: Adaptive
adaptive.description: Automatically adjusts to your system preference and device context.

focused.title: Focused
focused.description: Prioritizes legibility and core functionality above all else.
